notes: RE-ASSESS after Control fix (5e22e47c). backchannel-observe for mistral-vibe. Vibe renders a TUI-only tool-permission dialog (approval_app Textual widget, an in-memory asyncio.Future never written to messages.jsonl) — exactly the transcript-invisible waiting state read-back (issue #732) targets. The read-back path is reader.CaptureScreen -> DetectUI -> TerminalObserver -> SessionDetector, gated on control consent at terminal_observer.go:111. HALF-FIXED: commit 5e22e47c declares Control{SupportsInput}+ControlPermission on vibe/agent.go, so the consent gate now opens for vibe (blocker #1 resolved). STILL BROKEN: DetectUI's trustDialogMarkers (uidetect.go) are Claude-Code-only and don't cover vibe's 'Permission for the … tool' phrasing, so DetectUI returns UIKindNone and the working->waiting edge never fires. daemon=bug — one feasible blocker left (add vibe markers), a documented follow-up per the Control-fix commit message. Control alone satisfies the sibling 6.1 backchannel-control (inject + observe the injected turn), NOT this scenario's read-back waiting edge. KNOWN-FAILING: the spec below asserts the CORRECT waiting arc; the recording is expected to show the session stay working (write-gap) while the dialog is held, never waiting. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), birth anchored to start unpinned. Observations: model=mistral-medium-3.5 (live config.active_model), tokens observable (sidecar context_tokens), cost NOT (vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity). BACKFLOW (re-spec): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — birth re-templated as presession_birth->session_birth(new_session) from the codex sibling (a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles under a DIFFERENT session_id); every post-birth phase pins same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS: the offline replay golden cannot reproduce vibe's meta.json sidecar (model + tokens are sidecar-only, read live), so model and tokens are UNVERIFIABLE offline — like kiro-cli the observation vector asserts neither model nor tokens (agent only, cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false).
